basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of Anna University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B. Tech and M.E / M.Tech - Mechanical Engineering (All Specialization)/ Polymer Technology, Basic Knowledge in Polymer composites material preparation
qualification.details: B.E / B. Tech and M.E / M.Tech - Mechanical Engineering (All Specialization)/ Polymer Technology Basic Knowledge in Polymer composites material preparation

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Anna University Project Assistant recruitment is 07 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E / B. Tech and M.E / M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering (All Specializations) or Polymer Technology, along with basic knowledge in Polymer composites material preparation.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post in Anna University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this Anna University recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 620024.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Assistant position is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CMRG/eOffice E - 671131/113.
